de: POSCO Future M, Freiwilligenarbeit zur Wiederherstellung des Flussökosystems in Pohang. [ZD Net Korea] POSCO Future M gab bekannt, dass es am 22. den freiwilligen „Future M Nature Guard Day“ in Naengcheon, Nam-gu, Stadt Pohang, durchgeführt hat, um die Artenvielfalt zu bewahren und das lokale Flussökosystem wiederherzustellen. Bei dieser ehrenamtlichen Aktivität beteiligten sich etwa 40 Mitarbeiter von POSCO Future M und ihre Familien an der Herstellung von „Samenkugeln“, indem sie roten Ton und Samen vermischten, und warfen sie in das Naengcheon-Gebiet, das 2022 nach den Schäden durch den Taifun wiederhergestellt wird Tulpenblume…
title: 포스코퓨처엠, 포항서 하천 생태계 복원 봉사활동
description: [지디넷코리아]포스코퓨처엠이 생물다양성 보전과 지역 하천 생태계 복원을 위해 22일 포항시 남구 냉천에서 ‘퓨처엠 네이처 가드 데이’ 봉사활동을 실시했다고 밝혔다.이번 봉사활동에서는 포스코퓨처엠 직원 및 가족 40여명이 참여해 황토와 씨앗을 섞어 '씨드볼'을 만들고, 2022년 태풍 피해로 복원 중인 냉천 일대에 투척했다. 씨앗이 안정적으로 발아해 생육하면, 냉천에는 국가보호종인 벌개미취를 비롯해 층꽃나무, 감국, 배초향, 털부처꽃 등 하천 환경에 적합한 다양…
en: POSCO Future M, volunteer work to restore river ecosystem in Pohang. [ZD Net Korea] POSCO Future M announced that it conducted 'Future M Nature Guard Day' volunteer work in Naengcheon, Nam-gu, Pohang City on the 22nd to preserve biodiversity and restore the local river ecosystem. In this volunteer activity, about 40 POSCO Future M employees and their families participated to make 'seed balls' by mixing red clay and seeds and threw them in the Naengcheon area, which is being restored from typhoon damage in 2022. When the seeds germinate and grow stably, cold springs contain a variety of plants suitable for the river environment, such as nationally protected species such as the nationally protected species, dogwood, chrysanthemum, prickly pear, and tulipflower…
la: POSCO Future M, opus voluntarium ad ecosystemandum flumen in Pohang restituendum. [ZD Net Korea] POSCO Future M denuntiavit quod 'Futurum M Naturam Custodiae diei' voluntarium in Naengcheon, Nam-gu, urbe Pohang die 22 ad conservandam biodiversitatem conservandam ac fluvium loci ecosystem restituendum est. In hac voluntaria actione, circiter 40 POSCO Future M conductos et familiae suas participatas facere "semen pilas" miscendo argillas et semina rubra, easque in Naengcheon area proiecit, quae ex typhonum damno anno 2022. Cum semina germinant et stabiliter crescunt, fontes frigidae varias plantas ad ambitum fluminis aptam continent, quales nationales species tutantur sicut species nationalis tuta, species, pirus, pyra.

de: Ein warmer Schauer von Kopf bis Fuß mitten auf einem Feld. „Beep beep, chochocho, chizzi, jjorolong~, beeplong~“ Es ist ein Vogelgeräusch. Schließen Sie die Augen und lauschen Sie dem Vogelgezwitscher. Es gibt keine Möglichkeit, die klare Stimme eines Vogels in menschlicher Sprache auszudrücken. Recken sich Vögel wie der Bauernfrühling auch im Frühling und haben morgens viel zu tun? In Neutteul dämmerte der Morgen eines Frühlingstages. Sobald ich aufwachte, eilte ich in meiner Pyjamahose und meinen Hausschuhen auf das Feld. Dabei geht es darum, den Ausdruck der Gemüsesorten und Bäume zu betrachten und zu fragen, wie es ihnen geht. Nach dem starken Frühlingsregen am vergangenen Donnerstag sind die Zwiebeln merklich höher und praller geworden. 3…
title: 머리부터 발끝까지, 밭 한 가운데서 하는 따뜻한 샤워
description:
"삐삐, 초초초, 찌찌, 쪼로롱~, 삐롱~"

새소리다. 눈을 감고 새소리에 귀를 기울인다. 새의 맑은 음성을 도무지 인간의 언어로 표현할 재간이 없다. 농부의 봄처럼 새들도 봄이면 기지개를 켜고 아침부터 할 일이 많은 걸까.

봄날 느루뜰에 아침이 밝았다. 일어나자마자 잠옷 바지에 슬리퍼 차림으로 서둘러 밭으로 나갔다. 채소들과 나무들 표정을 보고 안부를 묻기 위해서다. 지난주 목요일 세찬 봄비가 내린 후 양파는 눈에 띄게 키가 자랐고 몸집도 토실해졌다. 3…
en:
A warm shower from head to toe in the middle of a field. “Beep beep, chochocho, jjijji, jjorolong~, piplong~”

It's the sound of birds. Close your eyes and listen to the birdsong. There is no way to express the clear voice of a bird in human language. Like the farmer's spring, do birds also stretch themselves in spring and have a lot of work to do in the morning?

The morning dawned in Neutteul on a spring day. As soon as I woke up, I hurried out to the field in my pajama pants and slippers. This is to look at the expressions of the vegetables and trees and ask how they are doing. After the strong spring rain last Thursday, the onions grew noticeably taller and plumper. 3…
la: Imbrem calidum a capite ad calcem in medio agro. "Ave, custodite, chochocho, chizzi, jjorolong~, beeplong~" Sonus avis est. Oculos claude, et oscines audi. Non est modus expresse claram vocem avium in lingua humana. Sicut ver agricolae, an aves quoque vere se extendunt et multum mane faciunt? Mane illuxit in Neutteul verno die. Ut primum evigilavi, in pajama braccas et soleas ad campum properavi. Hoc est intueri voces herbarum et arborum et quaeramus quomodo se habeant. Post pluviam validam, quae Iovis proxima est, cepae conspicue altiores et pinguiores creverunt. 3…

de: Auswahl eines Beinhauses für eine Indoor-Gedenkstätte, eine Geschichte aus einer Beratung im Tongil-ro Memorial Park. Hallo, ich bin Assistant Manager, ein Bestattungsberater mit 20 Jahren Erfahrung. Bei der Durchführung von Bestattungsgesprächen machen sich viele Familien als erstes Sorgen. Die Frage ist, ob eine Gedenkstätte im Innenbereich oder eine externe Grabstätte wie ein Natur- oder Arboretum gewählt werden soll. Da es sich bei einer Grabstätte um einen Ort handelt, der nach der Entscheidung über einen langen Zeitraum erhalten bleibt, ist es wichtig, die Verwaltungsmethoden, die Besuchsumgebung und die Betriebsstabilität zu berücksichtigen, anstatt nur auf den Preis oder den Standort zu achten. …
title: 실내 추모시설 납골당 선택, 통일로 추모공원 상담에서 나온 이야기
description:
안녕하세요, 20년 경력 장례 컨설턴트 차부장입니다. 장지 상담을 진행하다 보면 많은 가족분들이 가장 먼저 고민하는 부분이 있습니다. 바로 실내 추모시설을 선택할 것인지, 자연장이나 수목장 같은 외부 장지를 선택할 것인지에 대한 문제입니다. 장지는 한 번 결정하면 장기간 유지되는 공간이기 때문에 단순히 가격이나 위치만 보고 결정하기보다는 관리 방식과 방문 환경, 그리고 운영 안정성까지 함께 고려하는 것이 중요합니다.

















…
en:
Selection of a charnel house for an indoor memorial facility, a story from a consultation at the Tongil-ro Memorial Park. Hello, I am Deputy Manager, a funeral consultant with 20 years of experience. When conducting funeral consultations, the first thing many families worry about is. The question is whether to choose an indoor memorial facility or an external burial site such as a natural or arboretum. Since a burial site is a space that will be maintained for a long time once decided, it is important to consider management methods, visiting environment, and operational stability rather than simply looking at price or location.

















…
la: Electio de domo channel pro facilitas memoriae in tectis, narratio ex consultatione apud Park Tongil-ro Memorial. Salve, Procurator Assistens sum, funeris consultus cum XX annis experientiae. Cum funebres consultationes agunt, primum multae familiae solliciti sunt. Quaesitum est, an facilitas monumenti ametis eligendi an externum sepulchri quale sit naturale vel arboretum. Quia locus sepulchri est spatium quod semel statutum est diu servabitur, interest administrationem methodorum considerare, ambitum invisere, et stabilitatem perficiendi potius quam solum pretium vel locum quaerere. ...

de: Hinweise zur Lösung des Instabilitätsproblems bei der Blutzuckermessung mit einem Pflaster finden. [ZD Net Korea] Ein inländisches Forschungsteam hat die Möglichkeit vorgestellt, die Genauigkeits- und Stabilitätsprobleme zu lösen, die bei der Messung des Blutzuckerspiegels mit einem Pflaster auftreten. POSTECH (Pohang University of Science and Technology) gab am 17. bekannt, dass es eine „Strukturumwandlungselektrode“ entwickelt hat, die biologische Signale stabil von der Haut empfangen kann. Die Forschungsergebnisse wurden als Titelblatt in „Advanced Materials“, einer internationalen Fachzeitschrift auf dem Gebiet der Biomaterialien, veröffentlicht. Die Forschung wurde von Professor Lim Geun-bae von der Fakultät für Maschinenbau und dem Forschungsteam von Dr. Lee Jung-ho und Dr. Ga-eun Yoon durchgeführt. Professor Seong-min Park und Cheol-hong Kim leiteten das Verfahren. Die an der Hautoberfläche angebrachte „Epidermiselektrode“ ist einfach zu verwenden, aber…
title: 패치로 혈당 측정 때 불안정 문제 풀 실마리 찾아
description: [지디넷코리아]국내 연구진이 패치로 혈당 측정시 발생하는 정확성 및 안정성 문제를 해결할 가능성이 제시됐다.POSTECH(포항공대)는 피부로부터 생체신호를 안정적으로 얻을 수 있는 '구조변환형 전극'을 개발했다고 17일 밝혔다.연구결과는 생체재료 분야 국제 학술지인 ‘어드밴스드 머티리얼즈'에 표지 논문으로 게재됐다.연구는 기계공학과 임근배 교수와 이중호·윤가은 박사 연구팀이 박성민·김철홍 교수가 진행했다.피부 표면에 붙이는 ‘표피형 전극’은 사용이 간편하지만,…
en: Finding clues to solving the instability problem when measuring blood sugar with a patch. [ZD Net Korea] A domestic research team has presented the possibility of solving the accuracy and stability problems that arise when measuring blood sugar with a patch. POSTECH (Pohang University of Science and Technology) announced on the 17th that it has developed a 'structure conversion electrode' that can stably obtain biological signals from the skin. The research results were published as a cover paper in 'Advanced Materials', an international academic journal in the field of biomaterials. The research was conducted by Professor Lim Geun-bae of the Department of Mechanical Engineering and the research team of Dr. Lee Jung-ho and Dr. Ga-eun Yoon. Professor Seong-min Park and Cheol-hong Kim conducted the proceedings. The ‘epidermal electrode’ attached to the surface of the skin is easy to use, but…
la: Extare invento ad problema solvendum inconstantiam cum mensurans sanguinem saccharo cum commissura. [ZD Net Korea] Turma domestica investigationis ostendit facultatem accurate ac stabilitatem problematum solvendi, quae oriuntur cum aequat commissuram sanguinis saccharo metiendi. POSTECH (Pohang University of Science and Technology) annuntiavit die 17 elaborasse "conversionis structuram electrode" quae signa biologica e cute stabiliter obtinere potest. Investigationis eventus divulgati sunt sicut charta operculum in "Materias Advanced", internationale Acta academica in campo biomateriarum. Investigatio facta est a Professore Lim Geun-bae Department of Engineering Mechanicae et investigationis turmae Dr. Lee Jung-ho et Dr. Ga-eun Yoon. Professor Seong-min Park et Kim Cheol-hong in actis perduxit. Item 'epidermale electrode' superficiei cutis adnexum facilis est ad utendum, sed…
